title: Link two boards by a date field

posts.author: Bongers (Anders Skjødt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hope you can help a new user

I have a board there contains task, where the ID (left colum) are the task name. The board have a Excisions date colum.

I will like to make another board with staff-planning, there contain who is the responsible and how is the backup for each data.

Q1: What will the staff-planning board look like?
(are each line a date line?)

Q2: how to mirror the two boards?

If you can link to an example that will also be very persuaded

thx a lot

When i get smarter I will promes to help you back
